name: @thecryptodonkey/pallasite
description: Pallasite — Shoot rocks. Stack sats. Cosmic arcade Asteroids with Lightning payouts and Nostr leaderboards. Sign in with Nostr.

scripts.build: pnpm run sync-sdk && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.sync-sdk: if [ -f ../signet-login/dist/signet-login.iife.js ]; then cp ../signet-login/dist/signet-login.iife.js public/signet-login.iife.js; else echo 'sync-sdk: signet-login sibling not present, using committed copy'; fi
